phrases.cultural_note: Piazza Castello is the heart of Turin's Baroque city centre, surrounded by palaces, the Royal Palace and the opera house.

responses.english: It's the centre of everything, you're nearly there.
responses.phonetic: eh eel CHEN-troh dee TOOT-toh, see SEN-teh JAH.
responses.local: È il centro di tutto, si sente già.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Gianduiotto chocolate
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra il cioccolato gianduiotto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah eel chok-koh-LAH-toh jan-doo-YOT-toh?
phrases.cultural_note: Gianduiotto — Turin's iconic hazelnut chocolate — was first created here in 1865 by Caffarel.

responses.english: At Stratta or Gerla, under the arcades of Piazza Castello.
responses.phonetic: dah STRAT-tah oh JER-lah, SOT-toh ee por-TEE-chee dee PYAHT-tsah kas-TEL-loh.
responses.local: Da Stratta o Gerla, sotto i portici di Piazza Castello.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the Egyptian Museum
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva al Museo Egizio?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah al moo-ZEH-oh eh-JEE-tsyoh?

responses.english: On Via Accademia delle Scienze, ten minutes away.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah ak-kah-DEH-myah DEL-leh SHEN-tseh, ah DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: In Via Accademia delle Scienze, a dieci minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to take the cable car to Superga
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si prende la cremagliera per Superga?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PREN-deh lah kreh-mahl-YEH-rah per soo-PER-gah?

responses.english: From Sassi, near the Po, with tram 15.
responses.phonetic: dah SAS-see, vee-CHEE-noh al po, kon eel tram KWEEN-dee-chee.
responses.local: Da Sassi, vicino al Po, con il tram 15.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the longest arcaded street in Turin is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova il portico più lungo di Torino?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah eel por-TEE-koh PYOO LOON-goh dee toh-REE-noh?

responses.english: Via Po, with arcades on both sides.
responses.phonetic: VEE-ah po, kon por-TEE-chee soo en-TRAM-bee ee LAH-tee.
responses.local: Via Po, con portici su entrambi i lati.
